headline: Flywheel Launches GEO Capability to Help Brands Earn AI Recommendations Across Commerce Channels
summary: Flywheel, a leader in commerce and technology solutions and part of the Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) Integrated Media offering, today launched a new Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) capability designed to help brands earn recommendations within AI-powered commerce experiences across retailers including Amazon, Walmart, and Target.

headline: Amazon Prime Day helps consumers stretch their dollars on groceries: VP
summary: Amazon Prime Day (AMZN) is finally here as the 2026 consumer event kicks off on Tuesday and will run through Friday, June 26. Adobe Analytics predicts consumers could spend up to $26 billion in online shopping across this year's Prime Day. Amazon Prime vice president Jamil Ghani discusses the deals and value savings being offered, as well as the e-commerce outlet's practice of dynamic price matching.

headline: Target (TGT) Pilots DirecTV Ad Partnership To Link Video Ads With Purchases
summary: Target's retail media arm, Roundel, is piloting a new data-driven advertising partnership with DirecTV Advertising. The collaboration links premium video ads to actual in-store and online purchases at Target. Danone is participating as a pilot client, with broader industry involvement planned. Target, traded as NYSE:TGT, is moving further into retail media by pairing its shopper insights with DirecTV Advertising's premium video inventory. The pilot is designed to connect ad exposure on...

headline: Amazon Prime Day Shoppers Plan to Hold Out for Steep Discounts
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Patrice Kihlken used to get excited about Amazon.com Inc.’s annual Prime Day sale because she found the deals to be “really good.” This year she’ll browse the site for dresses and art supplies, but she’ll only buy them if the price is right.
